channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: JD Vance To Lead Delegation For Iran Peace Deal Signing In Switzerland

media:content.media:description: US Iran War LIVE Updates

item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei reportedly denied that a memorandum of understanding would be signed.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei reportedly denied that a memorandum of understanding would be signed.

item.title: Donald Trump Says Strait Of Hormuz Will Be 'Completely Open' On Friday

media:content.media:description: Trump hailed the deal made with Iran.

item.description: Donald Trump Says Strait Of Hormuz Will Be 'Completely Open' On Friday
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump Says Strait Of Hormuz Will Be 'Completely Open' On Friday

item.title: White House Hopes US-Iran Deal Text To Be Released This Week: JD Vance

media:content.media:description: The deal marked the biggest breakthrough towards resolving the war.

item.description: Vance also said the United States expects the economically vital Strait of Hormuz would be open without tolls on a long-term basis.
item.content:encoded: Vance also said the United States expects the economically vital Strait of Hormuz would be open without tolls on a long-term basis.

item.title: He Tortured, Raped Bashar Al-Assad's Opponents For Years. Then Came Judgment Day

media:content.media:description: Rafik A was convicted of 19 counts of crimes against humanity against eight victims.

item.description: The court said victims were "handcuffed and blindfolded, beaten with various objects and kicked for prolonged periods, folded up inside a car tyre, hung upside down, or electrocuted, often being forced to be naked."
item.content:encoded: The court said victims were "handcuffed and blindfolded, beaten with various objects and kicked for prolonged periods, folded up inside a car tyre, hung upside down, or electrocuted, often being forced to be naked."

item.title: Trump Celebrates 80th Birthday As White House Turns Into Cage Fight Arena

media:content.media:description: A series of UFC combatants paid tribute to the president after winning

item.description: In unprecedented scenes in the revered seat of American democracy, Trump sat with thousands of cheering fans as Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) combatants beat each other to a pulp.
item.content:encoded: In unprecedented scenes in the revered seat of American democracy, Trump sat with thousands of cheering fans as Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) combatants beat each other to a pulp.

item.title: Viral Video Claims To Show US Marines "Saluting" UFC Fighter. Here's The Truth Behind It

media:content.media:description: UFC fighter walked out of White House with two officials.

item.description: Online observers claimed that the service members were apparently saluting Medal of Honor recipient Ty Carter.
item.content:encoded: Online observers claimed that the service members were apparently saluting Medal of Honor recipient Ty Carter.

item.title: Combing Strait Of Hormuz For Mines May Take Weeks, Delaying Shipping Traffic

media:content.media:description: Iran and the US negotiated over the interim deal to halt the war,

item.description: It is unclear how many mines Iran may have laid in the strait, which handled 20 per cent of the world's daily supply of oil and liquefied natural gas before the war.
item.content:encoded: It is unclear how many mines Iran may have laid in the strait, which handled 20 per cent of the world's daily supply of oil and liquefied natural gas before the war.

item.title: At Least 31 Dead After Overcrowded Bus Falls Into Ravine In Ethiopia

media:content.media:description: Many people died due to delays in emergency response.

item.description: The overcrowded bus was traveling from the Dessie area to the capital, Addis Ababa, early Monday when it veered off the road and plunged into a ravine
item.content:encoded: The overcrowded bus was traveling from the Dessie area to the capital, Addis Ababa, early Monday when it veered off the road and plunged into a ravine

item.title: Iran To Charge Hormuz "Service Fee", Expresses "Deep Mistrust" In US

media:content.media:description: Details of the US-Iran deal were not immediately released.

item.description: Iran foreign ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei said Iran would not charge a toll for ships crossing the key strait under a new framework deal with the US.
item.content:encoded: Iran foreign ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei said Iran would not charge a toll for ships crossing the key strait under a new framework deal with the US.

item.title: Who Is Boris Epshteyn? "Psychiatrist, Fixer" And One Of Trump's Key Aides

media:content.media:description: Epshteyn is often present in Oval Office meetings.

item.description: Trump is reportedly said to put him on speakerphone during discussions without informing others in the room.
item.content:encoded: Trump is reportedly said to put him on speakerphone during discussions without informing others in the room.

item.title: Woman, 21, Dies In Bungee Jump Accident In Brazil, Her Last Social Media Post Shocks Internet

media:content.media:description: Authorities are investigating whether the operator had proper permits.

item.description: Video from the scene shows staff members carrying Freitas to the edge and throwing her over. She was only wearing a helmet.
item.content:encoded: Video from the scene shows staff members carrying Freitas to the edge and throwing her over. She was only wearing a helmet.

item.title: Hormuz Strait, Nuclear Program, Lebanon: Key Terms Of US-Iran Peace Deal

media:content.media:description: US has agreed not to impose any new sanctions on Iran.

item.description: Iran and the US have both said the Strait of Hormuz would start to reopen and the US blockade on Iranian ports start to lift as soon as the memorandum is signed.
item.content:encoded: Iran and the US have both said the Strait of Hormuz would start to reopen and the US blockade on Iranian ports start to lift as soon as the memorandum is signed.

item.title: Video: Russian Strikes Set Kyiv's 1,000-Year-Old Monastery Complex Ablaze

media:content.media:description: In Kyiv, at least four people were killed, and more than 23 others were injured.

item.description: Flames were seen coming out of the ancient buildings, including the Dormition Cathedral.
item.content:encoded: Flames were seen coming out of the ancient buildings, including the Dormition Cathedral.

item.title: Russia Unleashes Major Attack On Ukraine, 11 Dead, Historic Site Damaged

media:content.media:description: Zelensky said that the Russian strikes killed 11 civilians and emergency workers and wounded 53.

item.description: The attacks on the capital, Kyiv, and the second-largest city, Kharkiv, came after Zelensky and Russian President Vladimir Putin spoke separately by phone with US President Donald Trump on Sunday.
item.content:encoded: The attacks on the capital, Kyiv, and the second-largest city, Kharkiv, came after Zelensky and Russian President Vladimir Putin spoke separately by phone with US President Donald Trump on Sunday.

item.title: UFC Fighters Training With FBI Agents At Quantico? Kash Patel Reveals Details

media:content.media:description: Kash Patel shared video from Quantico, Virginia.

item.description: Kash Patel said that the collaboration with UFC may be the "greatest thing law enforcement has ever seen".
item.content:encoded: Kash Patel said that the collaboration with UFC may be the "greatest thing law enforcement has ever seen".

item.title: US, India Join Hands To Counter China's Supply Chain Dominance

media:content.media:description: The taskforce's launch reflects a broader strategic calculus

item.description: The US-India Business Council has launched an industry platform aimed at building resilient critical minerals supply chains between the two countries, as Washington and New Delhi accelerate efforts to reduce dependence on China-dominated resource networks.
item.content:encoded: The US-India Business Council has launched an industry platform aimed at building resilient critical minerals supply chains between the two countries, as Washington and New Delhi accelerate efforts to reduce dependence on China-dominated resource networks.

item.title: BBC To Layoff 2,000 Staff In A Bid To Cut Down 10% Of Budget

media:content.media:description: Cuts in BBC news are expected to lead to a large number of job losses.

item.description: With over 20,000 staff, the BBC is expected to cut about a tenth of its costs resulting in 2,000 job losses.
item.content:encoded: With over 20,000 staff, the BBC is expected to cut about a tenth of its costs resulting in 2,000 job losses.

item.title: Trump Threatens 100% Tariff On French Wine Over Digital Services Tax Ahead Of G7 Summit

media:content.media:description: The United States is the biggest importing country for French wines and spirits

item.description: France imposed in 2019 a three percent levy on the revenues earned by technology firms -- including American giants such as Facebook, Amazon, Apple and Google parent Alphabet -- within the country's borders.
item.content:encoded: France imposed in 2019 a three percent levy on the revenues earned by technology firms -- including American giants such as Facebook, Amazon, Apple and Google parent Alphabet -- within the country's borders.

item.title: 'Critical Step:' Global Leaders Welcome US-Iran Peace Deal

media:content.media:description: Hours before leaving Washington for G7 Summit, Trump announced an agreement to end the war

item.description: Secretary-General Antonio Guterres welcomed the peace deal as a "critical step towards the peaceful settlement of the conflict."
item.content:encoded: Secretary-General Antonio Guterres welcomed the peace deal as a "critical step towards the peaceful settlement of the conflict."

item.title: Israel's First Reaction On US-Iran Deal Is Not A Good News For Trump's Plan

media:content.media:description: Israel has taken control of areas in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria, amounting to 1,000 square kilometres

item.description: Katz said Israel won't withdraw from Lebanese territory as the interim deal is pending. He said Tel Aviv plans to stay "indefinitely" in lands it holds in Lebanon, as well as Syria and the Gaza Strip.
item.content:encoded: Katz said Israel won't withdraw from Lebanese territory as the interim deal is pending. He said Tel Aviv plans to stay "indefinitely" in lands it holds in Lebanon, as well as Syria and the Gaza Strip.
